title: Wandering Trader Maps
description: Now Wandering Traders can trade maps of any structure!
body:
# Wandering Trader Maps

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/wandering-trader-maps?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wandering-trader-maps)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

## 📖 Description

Now wandering traders can trade you maps to any of the structures in vanilla Minecraft. The rarer the structure, the rarer it will be for them to sell it to you and the more emeralds it will cost. They can even sell you a map to the Stronghold if you're lucky. A new compass has also been added that can be crafted or purchased from the wandering trader. the Compass Map Tracker. When you hold this new compass in your main hand and a map in your left hand, the map will point to the coordinates marked on the map!

## ⌨️ Commands

Give Compass Map Tracker:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot wandering_trader_maps:compass_map_tracker
```

Give a map to structure:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot wandering_trader_maps:map/<structure>
```
